node.text: Text reads "Galaxy S26 Ultra", "Own at 1,39,999", "Galaxy AI", "SAMSUNG", "T&C apply." Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra smartphone in dark purple/black, displayed at angle showing rear camera module with multiple circular lenses, metallic frame, and curved edges.
